{{Quote|The Prime Oligarch Rankwin Fopow has rescinded previous decrees, and now identifies his government as 'firmly undecided.'|HoloNet News|<ref name="Article" />}}
'''Rankwin Fopow''' was the [[Prime Oligarch]] of the [[Cadinth Oligarchy]], speaker for the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cadinth]]<ref name="Article" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|jediwatch/1359_2.html|Cadinth Loyalty Uncertain After Jedi Death}} is set on the date 13:5:9, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> He, and therefore Cadinth, supported the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during<ref name="Article" /> its [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|conflict]] with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the planet's [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]], [[Bodis-Ker Vitan]], during a pro-Separatist [[Saskapeg uprising|uprising]] in Cadinth's [[Saskapeg|capital]], the [[Oligarchy]] retracted its endorsement of the Republic. Fopow later withdrew all statements, instead declaring that the planet was "firmly undecided" between the two groups. His statement was included in an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="Article" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rankwin Fopow was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #55'']], a<ref name="Article" /> [[May 9]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]. The article that references him, entitled "Cadinth Loyalty Uncertain After Jedi Death,"<ref name="Article" /> was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
